"description": "MantisBT allows a bugnote author to access the note's Revisions page after losing access to the parent private issue.

### Impact
Disclosure of the private Issue's Id and Summary. The bugnote full revision body remains secure.

### Patches
- 71df1f67e05b2050cd4bd87839e6cc13747cf03f

### Workarounds
None

### Credits
